title: Create: Better Frequency
description: Create addon that lets you set Redstone Link frequencies by renaming frequency items or blocks. Matching now depends on both the item type and its custom name.
body:
# **Create Better Frequency** is a Create addon that expands Redstone Link frequency matching.

By default, Create Redstone Links use two items or blocks as a frequency. This mod makes the frequency depend not only on the item/block type, but also on its custom name.

Rename a frequency item on an anvil to create a unique channel:

- `Stone` is different from `Stone` named `#1`
- `Stone` named `#1` is different from `Stone` named `#2`
- `Stone` named `#A` only connects to another `Stone` named `#A`



For a Redstone Link to connect, all of these must match:

1. First frequency item type
2. First frequency item custom name
3. Second frequency item type
4. Second frequency item custom name

This is useful for compact Create builds, hidden doors, factories, bases, contraptions, multiplayer servers, and modpacks where many Redstone Links need similar item types but separate channels.

The mod works client-side and server-side, supports multiplayer, and keeps normal Create behavior while adding custom-name based frequency separation. 

### It also includes optional compatibility for Create Aeronautics/Sable.
